description.ko: 빛이 유일한 언어인 깊은 바다 속, 투명한 생명체들이 펼치는 평화로운 춤입니다.
description.en: The peaceful dance of transparent life in the deep ocean, where light is the only language.

prompt: A highly detailed, cinematic 8k render of the 'Abyssal Cathedral' in the AQUA-5 zone. Giant, transparent, bioluminescent organ-pipe corals pulse with #40E0D0 turquoise and #48D1CC teal light in the dark #000080 midnight zone. Schools of translucent glass fish swim through drifting marine snow and fluid #006994 ocean currents. Volumetric lighting captures the serene, high-pressure atmosphere of the deep ocean. Hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, Ray-traced reflections, mysterious and peaceful deep-sea life.
